allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://leetcode.com/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""query"""":""""query communitySolutions\($questionSlug: String!, $languageTags: [String!]\) { questionSolutions\(filters: { questionSlug: $questionSlug, first: 10, skip: 0, orderBy: hot, languageTags: $languageTags }\) { solutions { title post { content voteCount } } } }"""",""""variables"""":{""""questionSlug"""":""""find-the-string-with-lcp"""",""""languageTags"""":[""""javascript""""]}}')
